song.title: Who is He In Yonder Stall
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Who is He in yonder stall, At whose feet the shepherds fall? Who is He in deep distress, Fasting in the wilderness?
[C] Chorus ’Tis the Lord! oh wondrous story! ’Tis the Lord! the King of glory! At His feet we humbly fall, Crown Him! crown Him, Lord of all!
[V2] 2) Who is He the people bless For His words of gentleness? Who is He to whom they bring All the sick and sorrowing?
[V3] 3) Who is He that stands and weeps At the grave where Laz’rus sleeps? Who is He the gath’ring throng Greet with loud triumphant song?
[V4] 4) Lo! at midnight, who is He Prays in dark Gethsemane? Who is He on yonder tree Dies in grief and agony?
[V5] 5) Who is He who from the grave Comes to heal, and help, and save? Who is He who from His throne Rules through all the world alone?
song.author: Benjamin R. Hanby
